title: Implement `SystemProperties.getDuration`
issue_text:
* [x] Downstream of https://github.com/jenkinsci/remoting/pull/800

Allows to implement time-based system properties by letting users provide the unit they prefer, rather than be restricted to what has been defined by the developer.

### Proposed changelog entries

- developer: System properties can now use flexible time units :  `30s`, `3m`, `1h`, `2d`, etc.
